text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, June 02. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Got it, Mike. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
